threshold_workstreams.why_currently_false: The active overlap audit still reports overall_overlap_risk = high and concludes that baseline variations already absorb most simple threshold changes.
threshold_workstreams.refresh_artifact_or_decision_needed: A refreshed overlap audit artifact on the updated provisional core stack that explicitly re-evaluates overlap risk and states baseline_filter_overlap_risk_acceptable = true if supported.
minimum_evidence_needed: A published overlap refresh artifact that no longer reports overall_overlap_risk = high.
Explicit governance-facing statement that additional filter logic is no longer redundant versus the active baseline path.
Evidence that the refreshed overlap assessment supersedes the earlier high-risk audit for framework-governance purposes.
preconditions: Use the updated provisional core stack semantics without changing the core stack itself.
Keep item 5-8 and other parked experiment tracks closed.
Treat the current overlap audit as active source of truth until the refresh artifact is published.
allowed_actions: Refresh the overlap audit artifact using the active updated provisional core stack semantics.
Document whether redundancy signals still remain against the current baseline path.
Publish a formal governance-facing overlap conclusion.
disallowed_actions: Modify the updated provisional core stack.
Treat overlap refresh as retest authorization.

threshold_workstreams.why_currently_false: The active trade-design audit still says baseline trade design needs entry/exit redesign, best_hold_period_improves_current_coverage = false, and the conclusion explicitly says redesign must come first.
threshold_workstreams.refresh_artifact_or_decision_needed: A refreshed trade-design or equivalent framework audit artifact on the updated provisional core stack that explicitly re-evaluates sparsity-flatness and states signal_sparsity_flatness_audit_passed = true if supported.
minimum_evidence_needed: A published trade-design refresh artifact that no longer concludes baseline_needs_entry_exit_redesign = true for the active governance path.
Explicit evidence that signal coverage and flatness concerns are materially resolved for framework-governance purposes.
A governance-facing statement that the refreshed trade-design audit supersedes the prior fail state.
preconditions: Baseline overlap threshold refresh must be published first so trade-design review is evaluated on the latest governance path.
Keep the updated provisional core stack unchanged.
Do not reopen Phase B experiments while refreshing the audit basis.
allowed_actions: Refresh the trade-design audit artifact on the updated provisional core stack.
Re-evaluate sparsity, flatness, retention, and labeling sufficiency in governance form.
Publish a pass/fail refresh statement tied to the active governance path.
disallowed_actions: Use unresolved overlap findings as if they were already cleared.

threshold_workstreams.why_currently_false: The active validation artifact still says keep_candidate_experimental and can_retry_phase_b_after_validation = false, while baseline_redesign_go_no_go only allows the candidate as usable_for_framework_redesign_only.
threshold_workstreams.refresh_artifact_or_decision_needed: A refreshed validation artifact or formal replacement decision on the updated provisional core stack that explicitly re-assesses candidate usability for framework-governance clearance and states baseline_validation_candidate_usable = true if supported.
minimum_evidence_needed: A published validation refresh artifact that no longer leaves the candidate in keep_candidate_experimental status for governance purposes.
Explicit evidence that the candidate is usable beyond framework-input-only scope on the governance path being assessed.
A formal statement that the refreshed validation basis supersedes the prior validation fail state for this threshold.
preconditions: Overlap threshold refresh must already be published.
Trade-design / sparsity-flatness threshold refresh must already be published.
The validation refresh must remain within framework-governance resolution scope and not reopen strategy experimentation.
allowed_actions: Refresh candidate validation artifact on the updated provisional core stack.
Re-assess whether candidate usability is sufficient for framework-governance closure.
Publish a formal validation refresh decision for governance use.
disallowed_actions: Promote the candidate to paper trading.
Use framework-redesign-only usability as if it already satisfied governance clearance.

threshold_workstreams.why_currently_false: The formal closeout artifacts still say can_continue_strategy_experiments_now = false and official_strategy_retry_reopened remains blocked by governance closeout.
threshold_workstreams.refresh_artifact_or_decision_needed: A formal governance decision artifact on the updated provisional core stack that explicitly decides official_strategy_retry_reopened for framework-governance purposes after the first three threshold refreshes have sufficient evidence basis.
minimum_evidence_needed: Published refresh basis for overlap threshold.
Published refresh basis for trade-design / sparsity-flatness threshold.
Published refresh basis for validation-candidate usability threshold.
A formal governance decision that explicitly states whether official_strategy_retry_reopened is true or false for framework-governance purposes.
preconditions: The first three threshold refresh workstreams must have published sufficient evidence basis.
Decision framing must explicitly distinguish governance reopening from retest opening.
Decision framing must explicitly distinguish governance reopening from paper-trading opening.
allowed_actions: Prepare a formal governance memo or decision artifact.
Evaluate whether the first three refresh workstreams produce sufficient basis for reopening at governance level.
Publish an explicit true/false decision without changing retest or paper-trading status.
disallowed_actions: Treat official_strategy_retry_reopened = true as retest authorization.
Treat official_strategy_retry_reopened = true as paper-trading authorization.
Process the formal decision before the first three threshold refresh bases exist.

sequencing_rules: First: refresh overlap threshold artifacts for baseline_filter_overlap_risk_acceptable.
Second: refresh trade-design / sparsity-flatness threshold artifacts for signal_sparsity_flatness_audit_passed.
Third: refresh validation-candidate usability artifacts for baseline_validation_candidate_usable.
Fourth: only after the first three refresh bases exist, process the formal retry-reopening decision for official_strategy_retry_reopened.
Fifth: only if all four thresholds are clear, hand off to refresh active readiness artifacts.
Do not open atr_stop_corporate_action_policy during this phase.
Do not open retest_governance_artifacts_sync during this phase.
Do not open retest during this phase.
Do not open paper trading during this phase.
Do not open new strategy experiments during this phase.

readiness_artifact_refresh_rule.when_allowed: Only after all four active framework_governance_gate thresholds are refreshed and clear.

success_criteria_for_threshold_refresh_p: All four threshold workstreams have explicit source-of-truth refresh targets.
Threshold sequencing is frozen in official order.
The formal governance decision rule for official_strategy_retry_reopened is frozen explicitly.
The handoff point for refreshing active readiness artifacts is frozen explicitly.
Retest remains blocked and paper trading remains blocked throughout this planning phase.
